title: Crumbling Hearts
description: Hearts will be broken into pieces.
body:
## This mod is created for the sake of experimenting what the AI is capable of. There will be no updates and fixes. Please pay attention to the alternative mod [Fancy Health Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancy-health-bar).


![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/971704de1243ed9a386bd4a0004532bb4b4d962d_0.webp)
This mod will add particles of heart destruction!


![Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/713c10df5ddbddfd1764286121d13568cfc2c6ae_0.webp)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/b4DeLlUZZeE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f3dc9d96853574eacf7e3419ade2ebe52a45262_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Config</summary>

- The color of ordinary particles
- The color of the particles from the effect
- Number of particles
- The force of gravity 
- Spreading force
- The rate of disappearance
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6bba84fb459dc20e673f81621f20a4e60446fd9.jpeg)
</details>

![dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e08e3a93db97bba57248ee2ebc2c7002aa7dd94c_0.webp)
- Required [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (for configuration)


Have a nice game!
Fan fact: the mod created a neural network, I just supervised this process.
